direction_rows.reason: BK0480 still needs the original dual-core owners to define authority/support semantics.
600760 is the only widening step justified by strong BK0480-native evidence, but it still lacks current-v6 owner authority.
They are interesting enough to retain, but not clean enough to widen the actionable control surface.
It remains a negative local example rather than a usable confirmation or mirror layer.
The next lawful move is to refresh BK0480 control semantics while explicitly blocking cross-version authority leakage.
A wider role surface now exists, but replay should remain blocked until the refreshed control surface is audited.

interpretation: V1.30B freezes BK0480 role surface v2 as the correct local expansion posture.
The board can now move from local universe expansion to control-surface refresh, but replay remains explicitly blocked.
